[PATCH] net-mgmt/thanos: update 0.36.0 → 0.36.1

While I'm still rather new in maintenance, at least I can promise to keep it up to date.

P.S. Sorry for the delay with answering to your email (id 1scZLX-00000000IYS-0anX): I've read it, but unable to respond as my MX server unable to send mail to yours due to some network connectivity issue somewhere in between.
